description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:xenial Docker image with a global before_script that exports APT_CACHE_DIR to a local apt-cache folder, runs apt-get update and installs gcc, make, pkg-config, then installs doxygen, check and lcov using that cache. Define a cache keyed "apt-cache" that stores the apt-cache/ directory. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build_amd64 job that runs "make -j4 COVERAGE=1" and uploads the entire repository as an artifact. In the test stage add a test_amd64 job that depends on build_amd64, runs "make check" and "make coverage-html", and also uploads the repository as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on test_amd64, runs "make doc", creates a public directory, copies coveragereport to public/coverage and copies docs/html/* into public/, publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact, and runs only on the master branch.
